capabilities.name: Clang diagnostics summary
capabilities.summary: diagnostic collection requires a Clang frontend action capture

capabilities.name: Clang SARIF diagnostics
capabilities.summary: SARIF diagnostics require a Clang diagnostic consumer capture

capabilities.name: Clang AST summary
capabilities.summary: AST summary requires a stored AST artifact or frontend action

capabilities.name: Clang AST JSON
capabilities.summary: AST JSON requires a stored AST artifact or frontend action

capabilities.name: Inlining tree
capabilities.summary: inlining tree requires optimization remarks or debug locations

capabilities.name: Optimization remarks summary
capabilities.summary: remarks summary requires an optimization remarks artifact

capabilities.name: Remarks instruction mix
capabilities.summary: instruction mix requires parsed optimization remarks

capabilities.name: Remarks size diff
capabilities.summary: size diff requires comparable remarks inputs

capabilities.name: LLVM pass statistics
capabilities.summary: pass statistics require -stats JSON capture

capabilities.name: LLVM pass timing
capabilities.summary: pass timing requires TimePassesHandler capture

capabilities.name: LLVM IR similarity
capabilities.summary: similarity requires stored IR for compared units

capabilities.name: Bitcode analysis
capabilities.summary: bitcode analysis requires a stored bitcode artifact

capabilities.name: LLVM pass list
capabilities.summary: pass list requires pass instrumentation capture

capabilities.name: LLVM IR view
capabilities.summary: IR view requires a stored IR artifact

capabilities.name: LLVM IR diff
capabilities.summary: IR diff requires two stored IR artifacts

capabilities.name: LLVM CFG
capabilities.summary: CFG requires stored IR and function selection

capabilities.name: LLVM dominator tree
capabilities.summary: dominator tree requires stored IR and function selection

capabilities.name: LLVM call graph
capabilities.summary: call graph requires stored IR

capabilities.name: LLVM loop info
capabilities.summary: loop info requires stored IR and function selection

capabilities.name: LLVM SelectionDAG
capabilities.summary: SelectionDAG requires codegen capture

capabilities.name: LLVM Machine IR
capabilities.summary: Machine IR requires codegen capture

capabilities.name: Assembly view
capabilities.summary: assembly view requires an assembly or object artifact

capabilities.name: Optimization remarks detail
capabilities.summary: remarks detail requires an optimization remarks artifact

capabilities.name: Readobj detail
capabilities.summary: readobj detail requires an object artifact

capabilities.name: Debug info summary
capabilities.summary: debug summary requires debug info in an object artifact

capabilities.name: Debug info detail
capabilities.summary: debug detail requires DWARF debug info

capabilities.name: Debug info consistency
capabilities.summary: debug consistency requires DWARF verification input

capabilities.name: CodeGen data
capabilities.summary: codegen data requires a CGData artifact

capabilities.name: LLD map file
capabilities.summary: mapfile analysis requires a linker map artifact

capabilities.name: LTO summary
capabilities.summary: LTO summary requires a module summary index

capabilities.name: LTO function statistics
capabilities.summary: LTO function statistics require a module summary index

capabilities.name: Offload binary inspection
capabilities.summary: offload binary inspection requires an offload binary artifact

capabilities.name: Offload host profile
capabilities.summary: offload host profile requires offload runtime traces

capabilities.name: Offload device profile
capabilities.summary: offload device profile requires device runtime traces

capabilities.name: Offload memory transfers
capabilities.summary: memory transfer analysis requires offload runtime traces

capabilities.name: Offload synchronization points
capabilities.summary: sync point analysis requires offload runtime traces

capabilities.name: MCA throughput analysis
capabilities.summary: MCA throughput and port pressure analysis for an assembly region

capabilities.name: Exegesis hardware benchmarking
capabilities.summary: actual hardware latency and throughput benchmarking via llvm-exegesis; requires native target

capabilities.name: Template instantiation statistics
capabilities.summary: slowest template instantiations by total CPU time, extracted from -ftime-trace

capabilities.name: Clang static analyzer
capabilities.summary: static analysis requires a Clang frontend action with -analyze; substantially more expensive than compilation

capabilities.name: Linker map delta
capabilities.summary: linker map diff requires two lld.mapfile results from different snapshots

capabilities.name: Offload host regions
capabilities.summary: offload region map requires OpenMP/CUDA pragma analysis of the source

capabilities.name: Offload device trace
capabilities.summary: device kernel execution trace requires offload runtime instrumentation

capabilities.name: Offload memory profile
capabilities.summary: detailed memory profiling requires offload runtime traces with memory tracking enabled

capabilities.name: Offload synchronization analysis
capabilities.summary: synchronization bottleneck analysis requires offload sync point runtime traces

capabilities.name: PGO instrumentation profile
capabilities.summary: PGO instrumentation profile requires .profdata from llvm-profdata merge

capabilities.name: PGO sample profile
capabilities.summary: PGO sample profile requires .profdata from llvm-profgen

capabilities.name: Memory profile
capabilities.summary: memory profile requires -fmemory-profile instrumented binary

capabilities.name: Source coverage
capabilities.summary: coverage requires -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping build and .profdata

capabilities.name: XRay function call trace
capabilities.summary: XRay tracing requires -fxray-instrument build and XRay log file

capabilities.name: XRay trace comparison
capabilities.summary: XRay diff requires two XRay trace files from different runs; ingest both then compare

capabilities.name: AddressSanitizer report
capabilities.summary: ASan report requires -fsanitize=address build and ASan output

capabilities.name: UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer report
capabilities.summary: UBSan report requires -fsanitize=undefined build

capabilities.name: MemorySanitizer report
capabilities.summary: MSan report requires -fsanitize=memory build

capabilities.name: ThreadSanitizer report
capabilities.summary: TSan report requires -fsanitize=thread build

capabilities.name: SanitizeCoverage analysis
capabilities.summary: SanCov analysis requires -fsanitize-coverage=trace-pc-guard build and .sancov files
